Name: Jumper wires (small kit)
Purpose: will be used to connect all components, the kit has 20 of each jumper wire(20m-f,20m-m,20f-f)

Name: M2x4mm screws
Purpose: same as the 3mm those 4mm are just to secure some parts even more

Name: M2x3mm screws
Purpose: goes into heatset inserts to secure everything

Name: M2xL2xOD3 Heatset Inserts
Purpose: secures everthing with screws and soldering iron

Name: ESP32-C3 SuperMini
Purpose: Brain of everything, controls movement of servos, rfid reader, mosfet

Name: IRLZ44N (Mosfet)
Purpose: allows to completelly cut power to servos so they dont use any electricity if they arent used

Name: PN532 module set (RFID reader)
Purpose: allows to read rfid, small kit that has chip and reader

Name: 3.7V Battery
Purpose: allows the whole project live without needing to be in charger always

Name: Power module
Purpose: allows recharging battery and stable 5V output
